messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

Here's a quick update on the backend migration:

The migration is now 80% complete and we're on track for Friday delivery. Everything is progressing smoothly and according to schedule.

I'll keep you posted if anything changes.

Best regards

content.delta: Done! The email has been sent to alice@example.com with the subject "Project Update", confirming that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.
